user.title: Add Onesti Lock
user.description: Select the Onesti lock to manage PIN codes for.

abort.zha_not_found: ZHA integration not found. Set up ZHA first.
abort.no_devices_found: No Onesti Lock locks found in ZHA.

set_pin.title: Set PIN code
set_pin.description: Select slot, enter name and PIN code (4-8 digits). Slot numbers correspond to the lock's internal user slots (ZCL DoorLock). Slots 0-2 are reserved for master codes.

name_slot.title: Name a user slot
name_slot.description: Assign a name to a slot number. Used for RFID tags, fingerprints, or other access methods not set via the PIN menu.

progress.set_pin_progress: Sending PIN code to the lock...
progress.clear_pin_progress: Clearing PIN code from the lock...

error.lock_unreachable: Could not reach the lock. Press the keypad and try again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the logs.

abort.no_active_slots: No active PIN codes to remove
